# setDataAtPath

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the setDataAtPath mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk set-data-at-path --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.data <JSON> --input.path <String> --input.root <UUID> --input.sId <UUID>
```

## Examples

### Run setDataAtPath

```bash
csdk set-data-at-path --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.data <JSON> --input.path <String> --input.root <UUID> --input.sId <UUID>
```
